title: チャンピオンズCの後に・Fuu！活☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon wins the Champions Cup. The fans
cheer loudly as she goes all out at the winning
concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking out at each of her fans as they gaze back
in adoration, Smart Falcon sees her own radiance
once again. Her spirits have made a full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To give Smart Falcon a little extra push as she's
getting back in stride, I make a small suggestion
after the winning concert...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to throw a holiday meet and greet for
her fans before the Tokyo Daishoten, her final
challenge.
